name: User Profile Dashboard (Variant 1)
description: A comprehensive overview of the user's personal information, account status, recent activity, and security settings, designed for quick review and access to core functionalities.

name: Product Catalog & Discovery
description: An interactive interface for browsing a wide range of products. Users can apply various filters to refine their search, sort results, and switch between grid and list views. Each product card provides essential information and direct actions like 'Add to Cart'.

fields.name: Product ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the product.

fields.name: Product Name
fields.description: The official name of the product.

fields.name: Brand
fields.description: The brand associated with the product.

fields.name: Category
fields.description: The primary category the product belongs to (e.g., 'Electronics', 'Home Goods').

fields.name: Price
fields.description: The current selling price of the product.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

fields.name: Average Customer Rating
fields.description: The average rating given by customers, typically out of 5 stars.

fields.name: Total Reviews
fields.description: The total number of customer reviews for the product.

fields.name: Product Image URL
fields.description: URL to the main image of the product.

fields.name: Availability Status
fields.description: Current stock status of the product.

fields.name: Discount Percentage
fields.description: The percentage discount applied to the product, if any.

fields.name: Free Shipping
fields.description: Indicates if the product qualifies for free shipping.

fields.name: Search Products
fields.description: Text input to search for products by name, brand, or keywords.

fields.name: Product Categories
fields.description: Multi-select checkboxes or dropdown for filtering by product category.

fields.name: Brands
fields.description: Multi-select checkboxes or dropdown for filtering by brand.

fields.name: Price Range
fields.description: Slider or min/max number inputs to filter products within a price range.

fields.name: Minimum Rating
fields.description: Select minimum star rating (e.g., 4 & Up).

fields.name: Show Available Only
fields.description: Toggle to display only products that are 'In Stock'.

fields.name: Sort By
fields.description: Dropdown to select sorting criteria for the product list.

name: Admin Analytics Panel (variant 1)
description: A comprehensive analytics dashboard for administrators, focusing on critical system performance indicators, user engagement metrics, and resource utilization. Provides real-time insights and historical trends for proactive monitoring and strategic decision-making.

fields.name: System Health Score
fields.description: An aggregated score reflecting the overall health and operational status of the system.

fields.name: Active Users (Live)
fields.description: The current number of users actively engaged with the platform.

fields.name: Avg API Latency
fields.description: Average response time for all API calls over the last hour.

fields.name: Error Rate (24h)
fields.description: Percentage of server-side errors (HTTP 5xx) out of total requests in the past 24 hours.

fields.name: New Signups (Today)
fields.description: Total number of new user registrations recorded today.

fields.name: DB Query Time (Avg)
fields.description: Average execution time for database queries.

fields.name: Server Load Average
fields.description: Average server load over the last 5 minutes.

fields.name: Daily Transaction Volume
fields.description: Hourly breakdown of transaction volume over the last 24 hours.

fields.name: User Activity Heatmap
fields.description: Visual representation of user activity intensity throughout the week and day.

fields.name: Resource Utilization Trend
fields.description: Historical trend of key resource (CPU, Memory, Disk I/O) utilization over the past week.

fields.name: Top 5 Browsers
fields.description: Breakdown of user traffic by web browser.

fields.name: Recent Security Events
fields.description: Log of recent security-related events and alerts.

name: Task Management App
description: A collaborative task management application designed to help teams organize, track, and complete projects efficiently. It features multiple task views (list, board, calendar, timeline), advanced filtering, real-time updates, and a comprehensive detail panel for task attributes, comments, and attachments. Focuses on intuitive user experience and flexible workflow adaptation.

fields.name: task_description
fields.label: Description
fields.placeholder: Provide detailed information about the task...

views.description: Table-like display of tasks with customizable columns.
Kanban-style board with draggable task cards, columns based on 'status'.
Monthly/Weekly calendar displaying tasks based on 'due_date' or 'start_date'.
Gantt-chart like view for project planning, displaying tasks and their durations.

right_detail_panel.description: Displays comprehensive details for a selected task.

name: Social Media Feed (Discovery & Interaction Focused)
description: A dynamic social media feed page optimized for content discovery and rich user interaction. It features a prominent 'Stories' section, a streamlined post creation experience, and a main feed displaying a mix of posts from followed accounts and algorithmically suggested content, alongside a personalized right-hand sidebar for quick navigation and suggestions.

fields.label: User Stories & Highlights
fields.description: A horizontal, scrollable carousel displaying ephemeral stories or curated highlights from followed users and suggested accounts. Each item provides a quick gateway to their full story content.

fields.label: Create New Post Widget
fields.description: An interactive widget at the top of the feed allowing users to quickly compose and share various types of content.

fields.label: What's happening?
fields.placeholder: Share an update, photo, or video...

fields.label: Main Content Feed Stream
fields.description: The primary vertical scrollable area displaying a personalized stream of posts, including rich media, text, and interactive elements. Content is typically sorted by relevance or recency.

components.label: Individual Post Card
components.description: A template for a single post within the feed, detailing its structure and interactive components.

mediaAttachments.description: Array of image/video objects, supporting carousels

sub_components.label: Recent Comments & Input
sub_components.description: Shows a summary of recent comments and an inline input for adding a new comment.

fields.label: Right Sidebar
fields.description: A dynamic sidebar providing personalized content, suggestions, and quick navigation links.

components.label: Suggested for You
components.description: A list of accounts or content topics recommended to the user based on their activity and connections.

components.label: Trends for You
components.description: A list of trending hashtags and topics personalized for the user.

components.label: Sponsored Content
components.description: A small ad banner, typically contextual or targeted.

name: Support Agent Dashboard
description: Primary dashboard for a support agent to manage their assigned tickets, monitor overall system health, and quickly access critical actions. Provides an overview of ticket status, workload, and recent activity.

fields.label: Ticket ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the support ticket.

fields.label: Subject
fields.description: A concise summary of the issue or request.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed explanation of the support request.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Current processing status of the ticket.

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Level of urgency for resolving the ticket.

fields.label: Reporter
fields.description: User or customer who submitted the ticket.

fields.label: Assignee
fields.description: Support agent currently responsible for handling the ticket.

fields.label: Category
fields.description: Classification of the ticket to help route and prioritize.

fields.label: Created At
fields.description: Timestamp when the ticket was first submitted.

fields.label: Last Updated At
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent update or activity on the ticket.

fields.label: Resolution Date
fields.description: Date when the ticket was marked as resolved.

fields.label: Due Date
fields.description: Target date for ticket resolution.

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: Files attached to the ticket by reporter or agent.

fields.label: Ticket History/Comments
fields.description: Chronological log of all public and internal interactions and notes on the ticket.

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Private notes accessible only to support agents, not visible to the customer.

layout: The dashboard is organized into a responsive grid. The top section prominently features customizable analytics widgets displaying key metrics such like 'Tickets by Status', 'Daily New vs. Resolved Tickets', and 'Average First Response Time'. Below these charts, a central 'My Open Tickets' table provides a sortable and filterable list of tickets assigned to the current agent, showing Ticket ID, Subject, Status, Priority, Reporter, and Last Updated At. A 'Quick Actions' panel on the right allows for rapid ticket creation, assignment, or status updates. A 'Recent Activity Feed' section highlights new comments or status changes across all watched tickets. A sidebar navigation allows access to different ticket queues (e.g., 'All Tickets', 'Unassigned', 'High Priority', 'SLA Breaches') and reporting tools.

name: E-commerce Checkout (Standard Flow)
description: A multi-step user interface for completing an E-commerce order, guiding the user from cart review to payment and order confirmation. Features a progress indicator, distinct form sections for shipping, delivery, and payment, and a persistent order summary sidebar.

fields.label: Promo Code
fields.tooltip: Enter a promotional code to apply a discount to your order.

fields.label: Address Line 1
fields.placeholder: Street address, P.O. Box, Company name

fields.label: Address Line 2
fields.placeholder: Apartment, suite, unit, building, floor, etc.

fields.label: Save this address for future purchases

options.label: Next Day Delivery
options.description: Order by 2 PM for next business day

children.label: CVV
children.tooltip: The 3 or 4 digit security code on the back of your card.

fields.label: PayPal Information
fields.text: You will be redirected to PayPal's secure website to complete your payment. After successful payment, you will be brought back to our site.

fields.label: Apple Pay Information
fields.text: Pay securely and conveniently with Apple Pay. Your shipping and billing details will be automatically used from your Apple Pay settings.

fields.label: Order Review
fields.content: This section dynamically displays a consolidated summary of all entered shipping, delivery, and payment information along with the final cart summary. It serves as the last chance for the user to review details before placing the order.

fields.label: I agree to the terms and conditions and the privacy policy.
Place Order
fields.tooltip: Please agree to the terms and fill all required fields to place your order.

children.title: 1. Shipping Information
children.description: Where should we send your order?

children.title: 2. Delivery Method
children.description: How quickly do you need your items?

children.title: 4. Review & Place Order
children.description: Please review your order details before confirming your purchase.

name: Team Event Planning Calendar
description: A centralized calendar for managing and scheduling team-wide events, meetings, and project milestones, enabling collaboration and visibility across the organization.

fields.name: Description
fields.placeholder: Provide details about the event agenda, goals, etc.

fields.name: Location
fields.placeholder: e.g., Main Conference Room, Zoom Link, Office C-201

fields.name: Visibility
fields.description: Who can view this event.

name: InvoicePulse: Invoice Detail View
description: A dynamic and comprehensive detail view for managing individual invoices, featuring multi-tabbed sections for core information, payment tracking, communication, and audit trails. Designed for efficiency and complete oversight.

fields.name: customerNotes
fields.label: Notes for Customer
fields.placeholder: Optional notes to include on the invoice...

fields.name: internalNotes
fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.placeholder: Private notes for internal team use...

feed_items.event: Customer called for clarification on line item #2

name: TeamConnect Chat Hub
description: A modern team collaboration chat application featuring direct messages, group channels, rich media support, threaded replies, and integrated task management.

fields.value: Discussions about everything related to the team.
